JUDGE D. GARCIA; CLERK JUN P. PANELO; COURT REPORTER JOSEPH VICKSTEIN;REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-28-2002 IN DEPT. 501; CASE SETTLED; TERMS AND CONDITIONS ON THE RECORD (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT).
